items.title: Async/Await & Promises
items.description: fetch is Promise-based; you await the response and its body and handle rejections with try/catch.

items.title: Types & Interfaces
items.description: Type request bodies, and treat responses as unknown then narrow/validate before use.

items.title: Error & Exception Handling
items.description: Robust API calls check res.ok, handle 429/5xx, and back off — the same resilience ideas as Python error handling.
